title: Do we still need the Old testament?
body:
# do we still need the old testament? 
## Wednesday August 13th @ shed

### OBJECTIVES

- [ ] confirm title for short 
- [ ] come up with useful description 
- [ ] consider creative ideas for intro 
- [ ] think about how we will collaborate in the shed tomorrow 
- [ ] Try to figure out a more creative thumbnail that the algorithm will be pleased with

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
- Jesus said you have to teach people to do the commandments from the old testament to be great in the Kingdom of heaven 
- we have to tell the story of Jesus all the time to be disciples. To tell the story of Jesus you have to start at the beginning of jesus's story. The beginning of jesus' story is the Old testament. 
     - Where do we start the story of jesus? we have to tell the story of God and his people. It is impossible to tell the story of God and his people without the Old testament 
- it is impossible to read the New testament without the old testament, because the New testament is filled with repeating the Old testament

labels: Bible problems | problems with the Bible
teach me how to use the Bible
Israel according to the flesh |  the Jewish people
